audit_items.proof_trace: bid() carries only `external whenNotPaused` — no role modifier, no allowlist, confirming any address can call it. All internal gates (auction liveness, minBidUsdValue, available balance) validate economic/auction-state preconditions, not caller identity. The IBaseAuction interface documents bid() as 'Allows a user to bid', and the Dutch auction design requires permissionless market participation for competitive price discovery — open access is intentional.
